expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: heatmap highlighting effect scenarios cover activation, persistence, and reset behavior
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the "Focus (must cover)" explicitly lists "heatmap highlighting effect scenarios" covering "1) activation 2) persistence 3) reset behavior", and Section 2 further breaks out "A. Activation", "B. Persistence", and "C. Reset behavior" with described expectations.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled "QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 4a (Contract Check)" and states "Primary phase under test: phase4a". The structure is consistent with a phase4a contract check (evidence intake constraints, contract expectations, and completion status), even though it notes evidence is blocked.
